DARV.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-1.char: I’d rather die than hear that stupid pun one more time. Literally.
DARV.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.1-0r.ancien:
You’re back! Take somethin’ will ya?
Keep book’n’scrolls away from your fire tho.
DARV.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.2-0r.ancien: Ya fan of keepin’ things in place?
DARV.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.2-1r.char:
I personally am not.
But someone important to me is.
NEOW.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-0.char: So you bring people back to life? Glad I don’t need that.
NONUPEIPE.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-0.an: Oh my, what happened to you? All those blood stains and burnt clothes...
NONUPEIPE.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-1.ch: Oh these? I don’t pay attention to them whatsoever.
NONUPEIPE.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-2.an:
That is the very wrong attitude.
Here, come closer. This fine thing will do just the trick.
NONUPEIPE.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.1-0r.a:
Your strength in combat is no undoubtedly admirable.
Your sense of beauty however, can use some minor improvements.
NONUPEIPE.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.2-0r.a:
I love the way you dominate over your foes.
But that is no excuse for not taking good care of yourself.
NONUPEIPE.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.2-1r.c:
You have no idea how much you sounded like Keine just now.

Oh, Keine is... a friend of mine.
NONUPEIPE.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.2-2r.a: Pfft. Be honest with yourself, will you?
OROBAS.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-0.ancie: Burning feathers? Cannot die?! Want stories!!
OROBAS.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-1.char: My story is long, dull, and full of regrets. You asked for this.
OROBAS.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-2.ancie: Yes! Long stories! Good stories! More stories!!
OROBAS.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.1-0r.anci:
Fire lady! Take this!
Now more stories!
OROBAS.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.2-0r.anci: Phoenix lady! Take shiny! Birds love shiny!
OROBAS.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.2-1r.char: Appreciated. I am not a bird, sadly.
PAEL.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-0.ancient:
[thinky_dots]So you can regenerate flesh as well.
Yet your guilt have left a hole in your heart.[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-1.char: I sure wish that can regenerate.
PAEL.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-2.ancient: [thinky_dots]Here, have this and may you find solace.[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.1-0r.ancien: [thinky_dots]Here, take a part of me. Being immortal should not strip you from taking long rests.[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.2-0r.ancien: [thinky_dots]I sense your stress, burden, and regret.[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.2-2r.ancien:
[thinky_dots]You are bound by your decisions.
Perhaps one day you can also decide to let go.[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-0.ancient: FIERCE! FIERY! I LIKE THIS ONE!
TEZCATARA.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-0.an: Hello there, sweetie. You burn so [jitter][b]bright[/b][/jitter] and [jitter][b]vibrantly[/b][/jitter]!
TEZCATARA.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-1.ch: That is a weird compliment, but thanks.
TEZCATARA.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-2.an: Come now. Let’s make that flame even stronger, shall we?
TEZCATARA.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.1-0r.a: [jitter][b]Welcome![/b][/jitter] Come sit by the fire. May your sorrows burn away eternally.
TEZCATARA.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.2-0r.a: Come in, sweetie. Help yourself with some soup.
TEZCATARA.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.2-1r.c: Thanks. But I am more of a Sake person.
TEZCATARA.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.2-2r.a: Oh I see, that makes sense. It does help fuel the flame.
VAKUU.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-0.ancien: Vakuu The First Demon, at your service, young lady.
VAKUU.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-1.char:
I’m not particularly [sine]young[/sine], and you look like a hideous Youkai.
But some help wouldn’t hurt.
VAKUU.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.1-0r.ancie:
Fancy a deal? You have nothing you can’t lose. Not like you can die.
[i][font_size=22]Vakuu laughs menacingly.[/font_size][/i]
VAKUU.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.2-0r.ancie: I would say I have an exquisite offer for you, but it seems you are doomed for eternity already.
VAKUU.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.2-1r.char: I have turned this curse of immortality into my strength.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.0-: So you are immortal, have wronged others and constantly being revenged. Sounds like a certain [jitter]SOMEONE[/jitter] I know.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.1-: I’ve defeated an irritating immortal before. I don’t mind doing it again.
I’ve squashed thousands of ants like you. I don’t mind adding another to the list.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MOKOUMOD-MOKOU_MOD.2-: Again? My patience is waning. Is this entertaining?
My strength is gaining. Your life will be fading.
